data.title: Two shootings occurred in Washington, D.C.
data.description: Two shootings have occurred in Washington, D.C., the U.S. capital. Police are en route to the scene to investigate. (CCTV)

data.title: An account with a 35% win rate purchased $70,000 in Game 5 of the NBA Eastern Conference First Round playoffs, where the Knicks defeated the Hawks.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket prediction event for "NBA Eastern Conference First Round Game 5: Knicks vs. Hawks," an account with only a 35% win rate (0xe5b70fd855af9258d9463992e4f1ed7987905ee3) purchased approximately $70,000 worth of bets on the Knicks defeating the Hawks. The average opening price was 69¢, and the current price is 69.5¢, resulting in a floating profit of approximately $490. The NBA Eastern Conference First Round playoff series between the Knicks and Hawks is currently tied 2-2, with Game 5 scheduled for 8:00 AM Beijing time today. The Knicks' starting lineup is Anunoby, Hart, Towns, Bridges, and Brunson; the Hawks' starting lineup is Daniels, Johnson, Okongwu, Walker, and McCollum. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Strategy's STRC Preferred Stock Gains Momentum with $8.5 Billion Notional Value
data.description: Michael Saylor has announced that Strategy's STRC preferred stock has achieved a notional value of approximately $8.5 billion within nine months, describing its growth as "going viral." According to NS3.AI, Saylor highlighted that Strategy data indicates STRC has financed the acquisition of around 77,000 BTC in 2026 year-to-date. He also noted that approximately 80% of STRC holders are retail investors.

data.title: Former Fed Vice Chair and Goldman Sachs Economist Discuss Fed's Dual Mandate and Inflation Challenges
data.description: Former Federal Reserve Vice Chair and economist Roger Ferguson stated that regarding the Fed's dual mandate, the labor market is currently stable. However, he noted that there is still significant work to be done concerning inflation, which remains high at 3%. According to Jin10, Ferguson anticipates that the Fed will temporarily hold its position to observe developments. Similarly, Goldman Sachs economist David Mericle expects the Fed's post-meeting statement to acknowledge improvements in the employment market and rising inflation data, while maintaining existing policy guidance. It is anticipated that most members will support keeping interest rates unchanged, with only one dissenting vote, similar to the situation in March.

data.title: Australia's Travel Rule Implementation Set for July 1
data.description: Australia is set to implement its Travel Rule on July 1, as reported by Chainalysis. According to NS3.AI, Virtual Asset Service Providers must register by the deadline of July 29 to comply with the new regulation.

data.title: Paradex CEO Criticizes Token Generation Events as Cash-Out Strategies
data.description: Paradex CEO Anand Gomes has expressed concerns about the current state of token generation events in the cryptocurrency industry. According to NS3.AI, Gomes highlighted that many of these events are being used by project teams as a means to cash out rather than as genuine product launches. He noted that teams frequently issue tokens before developing a product, subsequently cashing out and leaving the project behind.

data.title: UK Inflation Could Exceed 6% in Adverse Scenario, NIESR Forecasts
data.description: The National Institute of Economic and Social Research (NIESR) in the UK has projected that inflation could peak above 6% under adverse conditions. According to Jin10, this forecast highlights potential economic challenges that may arise if unfavorable circumstances persist. The NIESR's analysis underscores the importance of monitoring economic indicators closely to anticipate and mitigate potential inflationary pressures.

data.title: CME FedWatch Tool Predicts No Rate Change in April
data.description: The CME FedWatch Tool indicates a 100% probability that the U.S. Federal Reserve will maintain interest rates in April. According to ChainCatcher, there is also a 2.6% chance of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut by June, while the likelihood of rates remaining unchanged is 97.4%.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI and Anthropic Discuss Advanced Network Models with U.S. House Committee
data.description: OpenAI and Anthropic recently engaged in discussions with the U.S. House Committee regarding advanced network models. According to Jin10, the meeting focused on the development and implications of these models in the context of artificial intelligence advancements. The discussions are part of ongoing efforts to understand and regulate the impact of AI technologies on various sectors.

data.title: Bitcoin 2027 Returns to Nashville After Las Vegas Stint
data.description: Bitcoin 2027 is set to return to Nashville, Tennessee, from July 15 to 17, following a two-year period in Las Vegas. According to NS3.AI, tickets for the event are currently available for purchase, although details regarding speakers and the complete program have yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Judge Denies Sam Bankman-Fried's Request for New Trial
data.description: A federal judge has dismissed the motion filed by FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeking a new trial. According to Bloomberg, Bankman-Fried argued that new evidence had emerged, prompting his request. The judge, however, rejected this do-it-yourself motion, leaving the original trial outcome unchanged.

data.title: Venezuela Nears End of Interest Rate Cut Cycle, Interim President Says
data.description: Venezuela's interim President, Rodriguez, announced that the country is approaching the end of the interest rate cut cycle that began in 2024. According to Jin10, Rodriguez stated that the upcoming monetary policy decision will consider implementing the final rate cut of this cycle.

data.title: Czech National Bank's Bitcoin Reserve Strategy Defended by Governor
data.description: Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl has defended the bank's decision to allocate 1% of its reserves to Bitcoin, describing it as a conservative yet innovative approach. According to NS3.AI, Michl highlighted that the bank's research indicates a low long-term correlation between Bitcoin and traditional reserve assets. This strategy is expected to enhance returns in Czech Koruna terms without elevating overall portfolio risk. The bank currently manages approximately $180 billion in foreign exchange reserves, which is about 44% of the Czech Republic's GDP. Michl linked this move to a broader strategy that combines strict inflation control with calculated exposure to non-traditional assets.

data.title: Ethereum's Value Tied to Its Ecosystem's Resilience
data.description:
The value of Ethereum, the second-largest cryptocurrency, is becoming more reliant on the strength of the applications and platforms built on its blockchain. According to Bloomberg, this dependency highlights the importance of the broader ecosystem in sustaining Ethereum's market position.

Ethereum's blockchain supports a wide range of decentralized applications and smart contracts, which are crucial to its functionality and appeal. The success and stability of these applications directly influence Ethereum's value, making the ecosystem's resilience a key factor in its market performance.

data.title: PUMP Tokens Burned to Enhance Ecosystem Trust
data.description: BWENEWS AI has announced the complete burn of all PUMP tokens previously bought back, amounting to approximately $370 million, which represents about 36% of the total supply. According to BWEnews, the organization has also committed to a programmatic buyback and burn of 50% of its revenue over the next year. This initiative aims to bolster trust and sustainability within the ecosystem. The current market capitalization of PUMP is reported to be $1.174 billion, although this figure may not be entirely accurate.

data.title: RedStone Introduces Settlement Layer for Tokenized Assets in DeFi
data.description: RedStone has unveiled RedStone Settle, a new settlement layer aimed at integrating over $30 billion worth of tokenized real-world assets into DeFi lending as collateral. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to bridge the gap between the rapid liquidation processes in DeFi and the extended redemption periods, ranging from 60 to 180 days, associated with many tokenized funds and bonds.

data.title: Venezuela's Interim President Expects Inflation to Approach 3% Target Despite Recent Price Rebound
data.description: Venezuela's Interim President Rodriguez stated that despite the recent rebound in prices for some fruits and vegetables, inflation is expected to gradually decline towards the 3% target. According to Jin10, this outlook reflects the government's efforts to stabilize the economy and manage inflationary pressures.

data.title: U.S. API Crude Oil Inventory Shows Unexpected Decline
data.description: The American Petroleum Institute (API) reported a decrease in U.S. crude oil inventories for the week ending April 24. According to Jin10, the inventory fell by 1.793 million barrels, contrary to the expected increase of 271,000 barrels. The previous week's data showed a decline of 4.47 million barrels.

data.title: Ostium Enhances Backend with Decentralized Execution Layer
data.description: Ostium has upgraded its backend infrastructure and introduced a new decentralized execution layer following the processing of over $50 billion in cumulative trading volume. According to NS3.AI, the recent rollout includes offchain hedging partners such as Jump, along with other unnamed prime brokers and major institutions, to manage directional exposure from user trades. Ostium stated that this development maintains users' self-custodial status while aiming to expand open interest and enhance execution quality.

data.title: AI TRENDS | DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1 Billion for New AI Venture
data.description: David Silver, a veteran of DeepMind, has successfully raised $1.1 billion for his new venture, Ineffable Intelligence, which is now valued at $5.1 billion. According to NS3.AI, Silver announced that the startup will focus on reinforcement learning and simulation-based self-play, diverging from the trend of using large language models trained on human-generated data.
